title: Technical Consultant #66234
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Cybersecurity
  • Position Title: Technical Consultant
  • Working Location: Bedok
  • Working Hours: 5 days (Mon – Fri, 9.00am – 6.00pm)
  • Salary Package: Basic salary up to $5,000 + Flexi Benefits + Variable Bonus
  • Duration: Permanent Role

Key Responsibilities

  • Collaborate with client organizations to design tailored solutions that meet their unique requirements.
  • Conduct product and solution demonstrations, as well as presentations and proof-of-concept exercises.
  • Be actively involved in supporting pre-sales activities, including participation in seminars and trade shows.
  • Develop and deliver responses to technical inquiries from clients and prospects, including Requests for Information (RFIs) and Requests for Proposals (RFPs).
  • Coordinate, plan, and execute activities with end customers, system integrators, and third-party vendors.
  • Facilitate, develop, and enable partners in solution selling and implementation.
  • Establish and maintain effective communication with our R&D center for product and project-specific implementations.
  • Participate in post-sales activities, including system implementation and project management when required.

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related IT field.
  • 1–3 years of experience in software application development, implementation, or support.
  • Proficient in application development environments and languages such as Java, JavaScript and Objective-C
  • Familiarity with JAVA application servers, including Oracle WebLogic and Apache Tomcat
  • Knowledge of API communication methods, including REST, SOAP, XML, etc
  • Proficient in RDBMS administration and operation (e.g., Oracle, Microsoft SQL Server, MySQL, etc.)
  • Experience with both Windows and Unix/Linux operating systems, including command-line tools, scripting, and basic system administration
  • Familiarity with directories such as Active Directory, ADFS, LDAP, and Single-Sign-On technologies is a plus
  • Experience in mobile application development is advantageous.
  • Hands-on experience in successfully managing large and complex IT projects, particularly in the banking or public sector domain, is a plus
  • Willingness to travel as required

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #66234 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
